text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hoppity-jam, floppity-jam! Tell me my luck for
today's training session...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? "Slow and steady wins the race?!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know what that means! Act like the old-timey
aristocrats and find the most auspicious route to
the destination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, first I need to direct myself to the most
auspicious coordinates...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! To think such a delightful place awaits me
beyond my auspicious orienteering!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This is the perfect time for a little breather!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this doesn't mean having fun or
anything unbecoming like that! This is just to
prepare myself for my training!
